summary: First end-to-end test of Mission Control Dashboard. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed (auth, agents, tasks, metrics, WebSocket snapshot+broadcast). Frontend: all 6 pages render and integrate with backend correctly via Playwright e2e (login w/ wrong+right creds, dashboard stats+filters+command input, WS green status, agents grid+sheet+message/kill, tasks 4-col kanban with create/delete/log dialog, analytics 4 metrics+3 recharts+date range, settings 3 tabs with test connection+toggles+slider+password change, logout clears mc_token and redirects to /login).

issues: Sonner toast container at top-right overlaps logout-btn for the toast lifetime (~3-5s). The 'Access granted. Welcome back, Commander.' toast can intercept clicks on the adjacent logout icon. Consider positioning toasts to top-center or bottom-right to avoid covering nav controls.

action_items: (Minor UX) Move Sonner <Toaster /> position away from top-right or shorten welcome-toast duration so it doesn't temporarily overlap logout button.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is monolithic (~516 lines). Acceptable for MVP but should be split into routers (auth, agents, tasks, metrics, ws) before adding more features.
WebSocket /api/ws has no auth (intentional per code comment) — fine for demo but should accept token query param before production.
AGENTS/TASKS in-memory globals are mutated without locks from both request handlers and the simulator task. Race conditions are theoretically possible but unlikely at single-worker uvicorn.
TASKS reassignment in delete_task uses 'global TASKS = [...]' which loses external references; safe today because nothing else holds them, but in_place .remove() pattern is cleaner.
Frontend api.js correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and 401-redirects to /login; auth.jsx logout properly clears 'mc_token' and redirects via window.location.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 throwaway agents via /api/agents/spawn (TEST_kill, TEST_Spawn) and 1 task via /api/tasks (TEST_qa_task) during e2e — they live in in-memory state and will be gone on next backend restart.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints and all frontend pages work end-to-end. The pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, agents (list/get/logs/message/kill/spawn), tasks (list/create/get/delete + 404), metrics (summary/tokens week+month/cost/latency), and WebSocket snapshot + simulator broadcast. Only nit: Sonner toast top-right overlay can intercept clicks on logout-btn for ~5s after login; wait 6s before logout in e2e or dismiss toast.
rca of the issue: Initial logout test appeared to fail (token retained, URL unchanged) because the post-login 'Access granted' Sonner toast sits in the top-right corner over the logout-btn. Playwright force=True bypasses actionability checks but the click point can still be visually covered. Reproduction: login, immediately click logout-btn within 5s -> click may be absorbed by toast. Mitigation: either move Toaster position (e.g. 'top-center' or 'bottom-right') or shorten toast duration. Verified by waiting 6s after login: logout then correctly removed mc_token and redirected to /login.
